IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YTREEIDE, MARILOU SEM, SOPHAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHMITZ, PETER $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, THAT PLAINTIFFS MARILOU YTREEIDE AND SOPJHAL SEM EACH RECOVE R FROM THE DEFENDANT, PETER SCHMITZ FOUR THOUSAND FIVE HUNDR ED DOLLARS.
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION JUDGMENT ENTERED
